title: Tallon International Easter Decorations, Bonnet Arts and Crafts, Egg Hunt - 6 Pack Carrots, Orange, 5x2
features: These super cute mini carrot decorations are perfect accessory for making an easter bonnet. They are lightweight and easy to use and would be quick and simple to stick onto you easter creation. (adhesive not included)

Each carrot is made up of a lightweight polystyrene coated in an orange fiber and finished with green paper stands representing carrot fronds. They measure approximately 4.5cm in length (excluding the green paper fronds) 9-10cm including the fronds and 1-1.5cm in width.
Not only would the carrots make a great bonnet decoration, but they could be used for an easter egg hunt, table decorations, and other Easter arts and crafts.
Not suitable for Children under 3 years of age.
